recommendations.title: Over the Edge
recommendations.overview: A group of bored teenagers rebel against authority in the community of New Granada.

recommendations.title: Project X
recommendations.overview: A young inductee into the military is given the task of looking after some chimpanzees used in the mysterious 'Project X'. Getting to know the chimps fairly well, he begins to suspect there is more to the secret project than he is being told.

recommendations.title: Bad Girls
recommendations.overview: Four former harlots try to leave the wild west (Colorado, to be exact) and head north to make a better life for themselves. Unfortunately someone from Cody's past won't let it happen that easily.

recommendations.title: Rashomon
recommendations.overview: Four people recount different versions of the story of a man's murder and the rape of his wife.

recommendations.title: Law Abiding Citizen
recommendations.overview: A frustrated man decides to take justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free. He targets not only the killer but also the district attorney and others involved in the deal.

recommendations.title: Brokedown Palace
recommendations.overview: Best friends Alice and Darlene take a trip to Thailand after graduating high school. In Thailand, they meet a captivating Australian man, who calls himself Nick Parks. Darlene is particularly smitten with Nick and convinces Alice to take Nick up on h

recommendations.title: Unlawful Entry
recommendations.overview: Happily married Michael and Karen Carr call the police after Karen is held at knife point during a failed robbery attempt in their home. Before long, one of the responding officers, Officer Pete Davis, helps arrange the installation of a new security

recommendations.title: Primal Fear
recommendations.overview: Defense attorney Martin Vail takes on jobs for money and prestige rather than any sense of the greater good. His latest case involves an altar boy, accused of brutally murdering the archbishop of Chicago. Vail finds himself up against his ex-pupil an

recommendations.title: The Favourite
recommendations.overview: England, early 18th century. The close relationship between Queen Anne and Sarah Churchill is threatened by the arrival of Sarah's cousin, Abigail Hill, resulting in a bitter rivalry between the two cousins to be the Queen's favourite.

recommendations.title: Sudden Impact
recommendations.overview: When a young rape victim takes justice into her own hands and becomes a serial killer, it's up to Dirty Harry Callahan, on suspension from the SFPD, to bring her to justice.
